fields.title: find_thread tool implementation
fields.description: Implement the find_thread tool that searches persisted sessions and returns matching threads with metadata.
fields.design: Create find_thread tool in extensions/tau/src/thread/index.ts. Tool accepts {query: string} parameter (AMP-compatible). Use ThreadCatalog service to search sessions. Search current workspace sessions first, fall back to global if needed. Rank results by: exact ID match, session name match, first user message match, content match, same cwd boost, recency boost. Return top N results with thread id, title, path, cwd, messageCount, updatedAt, createdAt, parentThreadId, preview, and hasMore flag. Format LLM-visible output as compact readable list.
